parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO automation_runs (correlation_id, trigger_event, status, started_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.correlation_id }}',
  '{{ $json.source_channel }}',
  'started',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id;

=WITH upserted AS (
  INSERT INTO customers (phone_e164, full_name, source_page, current_stage, current_status, last_seen_at)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $json.n_phone }}',
    '{{ ($json.n_user_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $json.n_source_channel }}',
    'lead_router',
    'new',
    NOW()
  )
  ON CONFLICT (phone_e164) DO UPDATE SET
    last_seen_at = NOW(),
    last_message_at = NOW(),
    message_burst_count = CASE
      WHEN customers.last_message_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 seconds' THEN customers.message_burst_count + 1
      ELSE 0
    END,
    is_rate_limited = CASE
      WHEN customers.last_message_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 seconds' AND customers.message_burst_count >= 5 THEN true
      ELSE false
    END,
    followup_count = 0,
    full_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(customers.full_name, ''), EXCLUDED.full_name),
    business_type = CASE
      WHEN '{{ $json.business_type }}' != '' AND '{{ $json.business_type }}' != 'undefined'
      THEN '{{ $json.business_type }}'
      ELSE customers.business_type
    END,
    current_stage = CASE
      WHEN customers.current_stage = 'paused' THEN 'goal_mentor'::journey_stage
      ELSE customers.current_stage
    END,
    source_channel = COALESCE(NULLIF(customers.source_channel, ''), '{{ $json.n_source_channel }}')
  RETURNING id, phone_e164, full_name, current_stage, current_status, human_required,
    do_not_contact, source_channel, active_goal_id, onboarding_completed,
    response_speed, message_length_pref, engagement_level, personality_notes,
    business_stage, business_type, is_rate_limited, message_burst_count
),
reset_goals AS (
  UPDATE customer_goals SET
    step_followup_count = 0,
    last_step_followup_at = NULL,
    momentum = 'active',
    updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE customer_id = (SELECT id FROM upserted)
    AND goal_id = (SELECT active_goal_id FROM upserted)
    AND status = 'in_progress'
    AND step_followup_count > 0
)
SELECT * FROM upserted;

=INSERT INTO conversations (customer_id, provider, chat_id, status, last_message_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $("Merge Customer Data").item.json.customer_id }}',
  '{{ $("Merge Customer Data").item.json.n_provider }}',
  '{{ $("Merge Customer Data").item.json.n_chat_id }}',
  'open',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (customer_id, provider) DO UPDATE SET
  last_message_at = NOW(),
  status = 'open',
  chat_id = EXCLUDED.chat_id
RETURNING id;

=INSERT INTO conversation_messages (conversation_id, direction, message_type, text, external_message_id, correlation_id, sent_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.conversation_id }}',
  'inbound',
  'text',
  '{{ $json.n_user_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '',
  '{{ $json.n_correlation_id || '' }}',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id;

=-- Load Context with pass-through fields
INSERT INTO conversation_summaries (conversation_id, summary, key_facts, message_count)
VALUES ('{{ $json.conversation_id }}', '', '{}'::jsonb, 0)
ON CONFLICT (conversation_id) DO NOTHING;

SELECT 
  -- Pass through from Merge Message Data
  '{{ $json.customer_id }}' as customer_id,
  '{{ $json.conversation_id }}' as conversation_id,
  '{{ $json.audit_run_id }}' as audit_run_id,
  '{{ $json.n_correlation_id }}' as correlation_id,
  '{{ $json.n_chat_id }}' as chat_id,
  '{{ $json.n_source_channel }}' as source_channel,
  '{{ ($json.n_user_text || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' as user_text,
  '{{ $json.customer_stage }}' as current_stage,
  '{{ $json.customer_status }}' as current_status,
  '{{ ($json.customer_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' as input_customer_name,
  
  -- Conversation summary
  cs.summary,
  cs.key_facts,
  cs.message_count,
  cs.last_agent_code,
  COALESCE(cs.memory_facts, '{}'::jsonb) as memory_facts,
  COALESCE(cs.completed_tasks, '[]'::jsonb) as completed_tasks,
  COALESCE(cs.user_strengths, '[]'::jsonb) as user_strengths,
  COALESCE(cs.user_struggles, '[]'::jsonb) as user_struggles,
  cs.last_question,
  cs.last_action,
  
  -- Goal context
  cg.id as customer_goal_id,
  g.goal_code as current_goal_code,
  g.goal_name_he as current_goal_name,
  cg.status as goal_status,
  cg.progress_percent as goal_progress_percent,
  cg.current_step as current_goal_step,
  cg.interaction_count as goal_interaction_count,
  COALESCE(cg.goal_state, 'discover') as goal_state,
  COALESCE(cg.phase_name, '׳”׳›׳¨׳•׳×') as phase_name,
  
  -- Customer profile from DB
  cu.full_name as customer_name,
  cu.business_type,
  cu.business_stage,
  cu.category,
  cu.response_speed,
  cu.message_length_pref,
  cu.engagement_level,
  cu.preferred_time,
  cu.personality_notes,
  
  -- Recent conversation history (last 15 messages)
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(msg ORDER BY msg.sent_at ASC)
     FROM (
       SELECT direction, text, sent_at, agent_code
       FROM conversation_messages
       WHERE conversation_id = '{{ $json.conversation_id }}'::uuid
       ORDER BY sent_at DESC
       LIMIT 15
     ) msg
    )::text, '[]'
  ) as recent_messages,
  
  -- Flags
  CASE WHEN cg.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as has_active_goal

FROM conversation_summaries cs
LEFT JOIN customers cu ON cu.id = '{{ $json.customer_id }}'::uuid
LEFT JOIN customer_goals cg ON cg.customer_id = cu.id AND cg.status = 'in_progress'
LEFT JOIN goals g ON g.id = cg.goal_id
WHERE cs.conversation_id = '{{ $json.conversation_id }}'::uuid;

=DO $$
DECLARE
  v_stage text := '{{ $json.next_stage }}';
  v_status text := '{{ $json.new_status }}';
  v_name text := '{{ ($json.customer_name_update || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}';
  v_human boolean := {{ $json.requires_human || false }};
  v_goal_code text := '{{ $json.current_goal_code || '' }}';
  v_customer_id uuid := '{{ $json.customer_id }}'::uuid;
  v_business_type text := '{{ ($json.business_type_update || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}';
BEGIN
  BEGIN
    IF v_stage IS NOT NULL AND v_stage != '' AND v_stage != 'current' THEN
      UPDATE customers SET
        current_stage = v_stage::journey_stage,
        current_status = CASE WHEN v_status != '' AND v_status != 'error' THEN v_status ELSE current_status END,
        full_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(v_name, ''), full_name),
        human_required = v_human,
        business_type = CASE
          WHEN v_business_type != '' THEN v_business_type
          ELSE business_type
        END,
        active_goal_id = CASE 
          WHEN v_goal_code != '' THEN 
            (SELECT id FROM goals WHERE goal_code = v_goal_code LIMIT 1)
          ELSE active_goal_id 
        END,
        updated_at = NOW()
      WHERE id = v_customer_id;
    ELSE
      UPDATE customers SET
        current_status = CASE WHEN v_status != '' AND v_status != 'error' THEN v_status ELSE current_status END,
        full_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(v_name, ''), full_name),
        human_required = v_human,
        business_type = CASE
          WHEN v_business_type != '' THEN v_business_type
          ELSE business_type
        END,
        updated_at = NOW()
      WHERE id = v_customer_id;
    END IF;
  EXCEPTION WHEN invalid_text_representation THEN
    UPDATE customers SET
      current_status = CASE WHEN v_status != '' AND v_status != 'error' THEN v_status ELSE current_status END,
      full_name = COALESCE(NULLIF(v_name, ''), full_name),
      human_required = v_human,
      business_type = CASE
        WHEN v_business_type != '' THEN v_business_type
        ELSE business_type
      END,
      updated_at = NOW()
    WHERE id = v_customer_id;
    RAISE NOTICE 'Stage "%" not in enum, skipped', v_stage;
  END;
EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
  RAISE NOTICE 'Update customer error: %', SQLERRM;
END $$;

=-- Update Summary with full memory
UPDATE conversation_summaries SET
  summary = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.summary_addition }}' != '' AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.summary_addition }}' != 'undefined'
    THEN COALESCE(summary, '') || ' | ' || '{{ ($('Forward Data').item.json.summary_addition || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    ELSE summary
  END,
  key_facts = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.key_facts_update }}' != ''
      AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.key_facts_update }}' != '{}'
      AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.key_facts_update }}' != 'undefined'
    THEN COALESCE(key_facts, '{}'::jsonb) || '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.key_facts_update }}'::jsonb
    ELSE key_facts
  END,
  message_count = message_count + 2,
  last_agent_code = '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.agent_code }}',
  memory_facts = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.memory_facts_update }}' != ''
      AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.memory_facts_update }}' != '{}'
      AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.memory_facts_update }}' != 'undefined'
    THEN COALESCE(memory_facts, '{}'::jsonb) || '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.memory_facts_update }}'::jsonb
    ELSE memory_facts
  END,
  completed_tasks = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.completed_tasks_update }}' != ''
      AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.completed_tasks_update }}' != '[]'
      AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.completed_tasks_update }}' != 'undefined'
    THEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.completed_tasks_update }}'::jsonb
    ELSE completed_tasks
  END,
  user_strengths = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.user_strengths_update }}' != ''
      AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.user_strengths_update }}' != '[]'
      AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.user_strengths_update }}' != 'undefined'
    THEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.user_strengths_update }}'::jsonb
    ELSE user_strengths
  END,
  user_struggles = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.user_struggles_update }}' != ''
      AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.user_struggles_update }}' != '[]'
      AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.user_struggles_update }}' != 'undefined'
    THEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.user_struggles_update }}'::jsonb
    ELSE user_struggles
  END,
  last_question = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.last_question }}' != ''
      AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.last_question }}' != 'undefined'
    THEN '{{ ($('Forward Data').item.json.last_question || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
    ELSE last_question
  END,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE conversation_id = '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.conversation_id }}'
RETURNING conversation_id;

=-- Insert outbound message
INSERT INTO conversation_messages (
  conversation_id,
  direction,
  message_type,
  text,
  external_message_id,
  agent_code,
  intent,
  correlation_id,
  sent_at
)
SELECT
  '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.conversation_id }}'::uuid,
  'outbound',
  'text',
  '{{ ($('Forward Data').item.json.reply || '').replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 4000) }}',
  '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.correlation_id || '' }}',
  '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.agent_code || '' }}',
  '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.intent || '' }}',
  '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.correlation_id || '' }}',
  NOW()
WHERE '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.conversation_id }}' != ''
  AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.conversation_id }}' != 'undefined'
  AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.conversation_id }}' != 'null'
RETURNING id;

=-- Complete audit run + log to audit_events
UPDATE automation_runs
SET status = 'completed',
    finished_at = NOW(),
    ended_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.audit_run_id }}'::uuid;

-- Log the event
INSERT INTO audit_events (run_id, customer_id, conversation_id, step_name, event_type, payload)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.audit_run_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.customer_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.conversation_id }}'::uuid,
  'complete',
  'message_processed',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'agent_code', '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.agent_code }}',
    'intent', '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.intent }}',
    'stage', '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.next_stage }}',
    'goal_step', {{ $('Forward Data').item.json.goal_current_step || 0 }},
    'goal_progress', {{ $('Forward Data').item.json.goal_progress_percent || 0 }}
  )
);

=-- Ensure no duplicate is_primary before updating
WITH cleanup_primary AS (
  UPDATE customer_goals
  SET is_primary = false
  WHERE customer_id = '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.customer_id }}'::uuid
    AND is_primary = true
    AND id != '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.customer_goal_id }}'::uuid
)
UPDATE customer_goals 
SET
  current_step = {{ $('Forward Data').item.json.goal_current_step || 1 }},
  progress_percent = LEAST(ROUND(({{ $('Forward Data').item.json.goal_current_step || 1 }}::numeric / NULLIF(total_steps_planned, 0)) * 100), 100),
  goal_state = '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.goal_state || 'discover' }}',
  phase_name = '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.phase_name || '' }}',
  active_task_title = '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.active_task_title || '' }}',
  active_task_status = '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.active_task_status || '' }}',
  momentum = CASE
    WHEN interaction_count > 5 AND current_step <= 1 THEN 'stuck'
    WHEN last_interaction_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days' THEN 'cooling'
    WHEN {{ $('Forward Data').item.json.goal_current_step || 1 }} > current_step THEN 'accelerating'
    ELSE 'active'
  END,
  interaction_count = interaction_count + 1,
  step_followup_count = CASE
    WHEN current_step != {{ $('Forward Data').item.json.goal_current_step || 1 }} THEN 0
    ELSE step_followup_count
  END,
  last_step_followup_at = CASE
    WHEN current_step != {{ $('Forward Data').item.json.goal_current_step || 1 }} THEN NULL
    ELSE last_step_followup_at
  END,
  last_interaction_at = NOW(),
  status = CASE 
    WHEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.complete_goal }}' = 'true' THEN 'completed'
    WHEN {{ $('Forward Data').item.json.goal_current_step || 1 }} >= total_steps_planned THEN 'completed'
    ELSE status
  END,
  is_primary = CASE
    WHEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.complete_goal }}' = 'true' THEN false
    WHEN {{ $('Forward Data').item.json.goal_current_step || 1 }} >= total_steps_planned THEN false
    ELSE is_primary
  END,
  completed_at = CASE 
    WHEN '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.complete_goal }}' = 'true' THEN NOW()
    WHEN {{ $('Forward Data').item.json.goal_current_step || 1 }} >= total_steps_planned AND completed_at IS NULL THEN NOW()
    ELSE completed_at
  END,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.customer_goal_id }}'::uuid
  AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.customer_goal_id }}' != ''
  AND '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.customer_goal_id }}' != 'null'
RETURNING id, current_step, progress_percent, status, momentum, is_primary;

=-- Get best matching agent with specialized mentor support
SELECT * FROM (
  -- Try 1: Exact agent_code match (for agent continuity)
  SELECT 
    a.agent_code, a.agent_name_he as agent_name, a.system_prompt,
    a.model, a.temperature, a.requires_goal_context, a.priority,
    0 as match_rank
  FROM ai_agents a
  WHERE a.is_active = true AND a.agent_code = '{{ $json.current_stage }}'
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Try 2: Stage in trigger_stages
  SELECT 
    a.agent_code, a.agent_name_he as agent_name, a.system_prompt,
    a.model, a.temperature, a.requires_goal_context, a.priority,
    1 as match_rank
  FROM ai_agents a
  WHERE a.is_active = true
    AND '{{ $json.current_stage }}'::text = ANY(a.trigger_stages)

  UNION ALL
  
  -- Try 3: Specialized mentor from goal's agent_code
  SELECT 
    a.agent_code, a.agent_name_he as agent_name, a.system_prompt,
    a.model, a.temperature, a.requires_goal_context, a.priority,
    2 as match_rank
  FROM ai_agents a
  JOIN goals g ON g.agent_code = a.agent_code
  WHERE a.is_active = true
    AND '{{ $json.has_active_goal }}' = 'true'
    AND g.goal_code = '{{ $json.current_goal_code }}'

  UNION ALL
  
  -- Try 4: Generic goal_mentor fallback if active goal
  SELECT 
    a.agent_code, a.agent_name_he as agent_name, a.system_prompt,
    a.model, a.temperature, a.requires_goal_context, a.priority,
    3 as match_rank
  FROM ai_agents a
  WHERE a.is_active = true
    AND a.agent_code = 'goal_mentor'
    AND '{{ $json.has_active_goal }}' = 'true'

  UNION ALL
  
  -- Try 5: ALWAYS include support as fallback
  SELECT 
    a.agent_code, a.agent_name_he as agent_name, a.system_prompt,
    a.model, a.temperature, a.requires_goal_context, 999 as priority,
    4 as match_rank
  FROM ai_agents a
  WHERE a.agent_code = 'support' AND a.is_active = true
) combined
ORDER BY match_rank, priority
LIMIT 1;

parameters.bodyParametersJson:
={
  "model": "{{ $json.model || 'gpt-4o' }}",
  "temperature": {{ $json.temperature || 0.7 }},
  "max_tokens": 1500,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "{{ $json.system_prompt }}"
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "{{ 
(($json.is_new_goal || $json.is_first_interaction) && $json.mentor_intro_message ? 'ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•? MENTOR INTRO ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?\nג? ן¸? THIS IS THE FIRST MESSAGE FOR THIS GOAL! Use this personalized intro as your opening message:\n' + $json.mentor_intro_message + '\n\n' : '') +

'ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•? GOAL INFO ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?\n' +
'Goal ID: ' + ($json.customer_goal_id || 'NONE') + '\n' +
'Goal: ' + ($json.current_goal_name || '') + '\n' +
'Agent: ' + ($json.goal_agent_code || 'goal_mentor') + '\n\n' +

'ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•? STEP ' + ($json.current_goal_step || 1) + ' of ' + ($json.total_steps || 7) + ' ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?\n' +
'Step Title: ' + ($json.step_title_he || '') + '\n' +
'Step Type: ' + ($json.step_type || 'ask') + '\n' +
'ג? ן¸? Is Final Step: ' + ($json.is_final_step === true || $json.is_final_step === 'true' ? 'YES - COMPLETE THE GOAL!' : 'no') + '\n\n' +

'נ??¯ INSTRUCTIONS:\n' +
($json.step_instructions_he || '׳”׳?׳©׳? ׳?׳?׳•׳•׳× ׳?׳× ׳”׳?׳§׳•׳—') + '\n\n' +

'ג?… SUCCESS CRITERIA:\n' +
($json.step_success_criteria || 'no criteria defined') + '\n' +
'Definition of Done: ' + ($json.step_definition_of_done || 'no definition') + '\n\n' +

($json.step_task_description ? 'נ?“? TASK:\n' + $json.step_task_description + '\n' + 'Expected Output: ' + ($json.step_expected_output || '') + '\n\n' : '') +

($json.step_followup_question ? 'ג?“ FOLLOWUP QUESTION:\n' + $json.step_followup_question + '\n\n' : '') +

($json.step_guiding_questions && $json.step_guiding_questions !== '[]' ? 'נ?’¡ GUIDING QUESTIONS:\n' + $json.step_guiding_questions + '\n\n' : '') +

($json.step_examples && $json.step_examples !== '[]' ? 'נ?“? EXAMPLES:\n' + $json.step_examples + '\n\n' : '') +

($json.step_business_type_hints && $json.step_business_type_hints !== '{}' ? 'נ??¢ BUSINESS TYPE HINTS:\n' + $json.step_business_type_hints + '\n\n' : '') +

'ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•? BUSINESS PROFILE ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?\n' +
($json.business_profile_text || '׳?׳? ׳ ׳?׳¡׳£ ׳¢׳“׳™׳™׳? - ׳©׳?׳? ׳?׳× ׳”׳?׳§׳•׳— ׳¢׳? ׳¡׳•׳’ ׳”׳¢׳¡׳§ ׳©׳?׳•') + '\n\n' +

'ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•? MEMORY ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?\n' +
'Facts: ' + JSON.stringify($json.key_facts || {}) + '\n' +
'Summary: ' + ($json.summary || '׳”׳×׳—׳?׳× ׳©׳™׳—׳”') + '\n' +
'Completed Tasks: ' + JSON.stringify($json.completed_tasks || []) + '\n' +
'Strengths: ' + JSON.stringify($json.user_strengths || []) + '\n' +
'Struggles: ' + JSON.stringify($json.user_struggles || []) + '\n' +
'Last Question Asked: ' + ($json.last_question || 'none') + '\n\n' +

'ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•? CONVERSATION HISTORY (last messages) ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?\n' +
($json.conversation_history || '׳?׳™׳? ׳”׳™׳¡׳˜׳•׳¨׳™׳” ׳§׳•׳“׳?׳×') + '\n\n' +

'ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•? STEP ADVANCEMENT RULES ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?\n' +
'CRITICAL: Read SUCCESS CRITERIA above carefully.\n' +
'1. If the user\'s response MEETS the success criteria ג†’ use intent: summarize and set state_update.step_number to ' + (($json.current_goal_step || 1) + 1) + '\n' +
'2. If NOT met ג†’ use intent: ask or teach. Keep state_update.step_number at ' + ($json.current_goal_step || 1) + '\n' +
'3. NEVER skip steps. NEVER go back. Only advance by 1.\n' +
'4. If is_final_step=YES and criteria met ג†’ set routing.complete_goal: true\n\n' +

'ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•? USER MESSAGE ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?ג•?\n' +
($json.user_text || '[׳?׳™׳? ׳”׳•׳“׳¢׳”]')
      }}"
    }
  ]
}

parameters.query:
=-- Load CURRENT step AND NEXT step with all mentoring fields
WITH current_step AS (
  SELECT 
    gs.step_number,
    gs.title_he as step_title_he,
    gs.title_en as step_title_en,
    gs.mentor_prompt_he as step_instructions_he,
    gs.mentor_prompt_en as step_instructions_en,
    gs.step_type,
    gs.success_criteria as step_success_criteria,
    gs.definition_of_done as step_definition_of_done,
    gs.task_description as step_task_description,
    gs.expected_output as step_expected_output,
    gs.followup_question as step_followup_question,
    gs.guiding_questions as step_guiding_questions,
    gs.examples as step_examples,
    gs.business_type_hints as step_business_type_hints,
    gs.is_final_step,
    g.mentor_intro_message,
    g.agent_code as goal_agent_code,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM goal_steps WHERE goal_id = g.id) as total_steps
  FROM goal_steps gs
  JOIN goals g ON g.id = gs.goal_id
  WHERE g.goal_code = '{{ $('Prepare AI Context').item.json.current_goal_code }}'
    AND gs.step_number = {{ $('Prepare AI Context').item.json.current_goal_step || 1 }}
),
next_step AS (
  SELECT 
    gs.step_number as next_step_number,
    gs.title_he as next_step_title_he,
    gs.mentor_prompt_he as next_step_instructions_he,
    gs.step_type as next_step_type,
    gs.is_final_step as next_is_final
  FROM goal_steps gs
  JOIN goals g ON g.id = gs.goal_id
  WHERE g.goal_code = '{{ $('Prepare AI Context').item.json.current_goal_code }}'
    AND gs.step_number = {{ ($('Prepare AI Context').item.json.current_goal_step || 1) + 1 }}
)
SELECT 
  cs.*,
  ns.next_step_number,
  ns.next_step_title_he,
  ns.next_step_instructions_he,
  ns.next_step_type,
  ns.next_is_final
FROM current_step cs
LEFT JOIN next_step ns ON true;

=-- Auto-create goal: use webhook goal_code if provided, otherwise default
WITH input_goal_code AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.current_goal_code }}', ''), 'idea_development') as goal_code
),
target_goal AS (
  SELECT id, goal_code, goal_name_he FROM goals WHERE goal_code = (SELECT goal_code FROM input_goal_code) LIMIT 1
),
fallback_goal AS (
  SELECT id, goal_code, goal_name_he FROM goals WHERE goal_code = 'idea_development' LIMIT 1
),
chosen_goal AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(tg.id, fg.id) as id,
         COALESCE(tg.goal_code, fg.goal_code) as goal_code,
         COALESCE(tg.goal_name_he, fg.goal_name_he) as goal_name_he
  FROM fallback_goal fg
  LEFT JOIN target_goal tg ON true
),
existing_goal AS (
  SELECT cg.id, cg.current_step, g.goal_code, g.goal_name_he
  FROM customer_goals cg
  JOIN goals g ON g.id = cg.goal_id
  WHERE cg.customer_id = '{{ $json.customer_id }}'::uuid 
    AND cg.status = 'in_progress'
  LIMIT 1
),
unset_primary AS (
  UPDATE customer_goals SET is_primary = false
  WHERE customer_id = '{{ $json.customer_id }}'::uuid AND is_primary = true
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing_goal)
),
new_goal AS (
  INSERT INTO customer_goals (customer_id, goal_id, status, current_step, progress_percent, goal_state, phase_name, interaction_count, is_primary, started_at)
  SELECT 
    '{{ $json.customer_id }}'::uuid,
    cg.id,
    'in_progress',
    1,
    0,
    'discover',
    '׳”׳›׳¨׳•׳×',
    0,
    true,
    NOW()
  FROM chosen_goal cg
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing_goal)
  RETURNING id, goal_id, current_step
),
update_stage AS (
  UPDATE customers SET
    current_stage = 'goal_mentor'::journey_stage,
    current_status = 'active',
    active_goal_id = (SELECT goal_id FROM new_goal LIMIT 1),
    updated_at = NOW()
  WHERE id = '{{ $json.customer_id }}'::uuid
    AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM new_goal)
    AND current_stage = 'lead_router'::journey_stage
)
SELECT 
  COALESCE(ng.id, eg.id) as customer_goal_id,
  COALESCE(ng.current_step, eg.current_step, 1) as current_step,
  COALESCE(cg.goal_code, eg.goal_code, 'idea_development') as current_goal_code,
  COALESCE(cg.goal_name_he, eg.goal_name_he, '׳’׳™׳‘׳•׳© ׳”׳¨׳¢׳™׳•׳?') as current_goal_name,
  CASE WHEN ng.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as goal_was_created
FROM chosen_goal cg
LEFT JOIN existing_goal eg ON true
LEFT JOIN new_goal ng ON true;

=-- Save escalation alert to DB
INSERT INTO escalation_alerts (customer_id, conversation_id, trigger_reason, ai_message, customer_message, status)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.customer_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.conversation_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Check Escalation').item.json.escalation_reason || 'unknown' }}',
  '{{ ($('Forward Data').item.json.reply || '').replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 500) }}',
  '{{ ($('Forward Data').item.json.user_text || '').replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 500) }}',
  'open'
)
RETURNING id;

=-- Find next suggested goals for customer after completing current goal
WITH completed_goals AS (
  SELECT goal_id FROM customer_goals
  WHERE customer_id = '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.customer_id }}'::uuid
    AND status = 'completed'
),
current_goal_category AS (
  SELECT g.category FROM customer_goals cg
  JOIN goals g ON g.id = cg.goal_id
  WHERE cg.id = '{{ $('Forward Data').item.json.customer_goal_id }}'::uuid
)
SELECT g.id, g.goal_code, g.goal_name_he, g.description_he, g.category
FROM goals g
WHERE g.id NOT IN (SELECT goal_id FROM completed_goals)
  AND g.is_active = true
ORDER BY 
  -- Prioritize same category first
  CASE WHEN g.category = (SELECT category FROM current_goal_category) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  g.sort_order ASC NULLS LAST,
  g.created_at ASC
LIMIT 3;

=UPDATE customer_goals
SET completion_celebration_sent = true,
    next_suggested_goal_code = COALESCE('{{ $('Suggest Next Goal').first().json.goal_code }}', '')
WHERE id = '{{ $('Forward Data').first().json.customer_goal_id }}'::uuid
RETURNING id, next_suggested_goal_code;

parameters.jsCode:
// Merge data from Load Agent Config, Prepare AI Context, and Load Goal Steps
const agentConfig = $('Load Agent Config').first().json;
const aiContext = $('Prepare AI Context').first().json;
const goalSteps = $('Load Goal Steps').first().json;

// Safe JSON stringify helper
function safeJson(val, fallback) {
  if (val === null || val === undefined) return fallback;
  try {
    return typeof val === 'string' ? val : JSON.stringify(val);
  } catch { return fallback; }
}

return [{
  json: {
    // Agent config from DB
    agent_code: agentConfig.agent_code || 'support',
    agent_name: agentConfig.agent_name || '\u05ea\u05de\u05d9\u05db\u05d4',
    system_prompt: agentConfig.system_prompt || 'You are a helpful support agent.',
    model: agentConfig.model || 'gpt-4o',
    temperature: agentConfig.temperature || 0.7,
    requires_goal_context: agentConfig.requires_goal_context || false,

    // Core context from Prepare AI Context
    customer_id: aiContext.customer_id,
    conversation_id: aiContext.conversation_id,
    audit_run_id: aiContext.audit_run_id,
    correlation_id: aiContext.correlation_id,
    current_stage: aiContext.current_stage,
    current_status: aiContext.current_status,
    customer_name: aiContext.customer_name,
    phone: aiContext.phone,
    user_text: aiContext.user_text,
    chat_id: aiContext.chat_id,
    source_channel: aiContext.source_channel,
    summary: aiContext.summary,
    key_facts: safeJson(aiContext.key_facts, '{}'),
    message_count: aiContext.message_count,
    is_first_message: aiContext.is_first_message,

    // Goal context
    customer_goal_id: aiContext.customer_goal_id,
    current_goal_code: aiContext.current_goal_code,
    current_goal_name: aiContext.current_goal_name,
    goal_status: aiContext.goal_status,
    goal_progress_percent: aiContext.goal_progress_percent,
    current_goal_step: aiContext.current_goal_step,
    user_blockers: aiContext.user_blockers,
    user_frustrations: aiContext.user_frustrations,
    has_active_goal: aiContext.has_active_goal,

    // Journey state
    journey_progress_percent: aiContext.journey_progress_percent,
    completed_goals_count: aiContext.completed_goals_count,
    total_points: aiContext.total_points,
    streak_days: aiContext.streak_days,
    goal_interaction_count: aiContext.goal_interaction_count,
    last_agent_code: aiContext.last_agent_code || '',

    // Step info from Load Goal Steps
    step_title_he: goalSteps.title_he || '\u05e9\u05dc\u05d1 ' + (aiContext.current_goal_step || 1),
    step_instructions_he: goalSteps.mentor_prompt_he || '\u05d4\u05de\u05e9\u05da \u05dc\u05dc\u05d5\u05d5\u05ea \u05d0\u05ea \u05d4\u05dc\u05e7\u05d5\u05d7 \u05d1\u05de\u05d8\u05e8\u05d4 \u05e9\u05dc\u05d5',
    step_instructions_en: goalSteps.mentor_prompt_en || 'Continue guiding the customer on their goal',
    step_success_criteria: goalSteps.success_criteria || '',
    is_final_step: goalSteps.is_final_step || false,
    total_steps: goalSteps.total_steps || 7,
    next_step_title: goalSteps.next_step_title_he || '',

    // Goal state fields
    goal_state: aiContext.goal_state || 'discover',
    phase_name: aiContext.phase_name || '\u05d4\u05db\u05e8\u05d5\u05ea',
    journey_length: aiContext.journey_length || '2w',
    total_steps_planned: aiContext.total_steps_planned || 10,
    days_elapsed: aiContext.days_elapsed || 0,
    momentum: aiContext.momentum || 'stable',

    // Task tracking
    active_task_title: aiContext.active_task_title || '',
    active_task_status: aiContext.active_task_status || 'pending',
    days_pending: aiContext.days_pending || 0,

    // Customer preferences
    response_speed: aiContext.response_speed || 'medium',
    engagement_level: aiContext.engagement_level || 'medium',
    business_stage: aiContext.business_stage || '\u05d4\u05ea\u05d7\u05dc\u05d4',

    // Memory
    memory_facts: safeJson(aiContext.memory_facts, '{}'),
    memory_decisions: safeJson(aiContext.memory_decisions, '[]'),
    user_strengths: safeJson(aiContext.user_strengths, '[]'),
    user_struggles: safeJson(aiContext.user_struggles, '[]'),
    last_question: aiContext.last_question || '',
    last_action: aiContext.last_action || '',

    // Multi-goal
    is_new_goal: aiContext.is_new_goal || false,
    all_active_goals: safeJson(aiContext.all_active_goals, '[]'),
    active_goals_count: aiContext.active_goals_count || 0,
    is_primary_goal: aiContext.is_primary_goal || false,

    // Next step info
    next_step_number: goalSteps.next_step_number || '',
    next_step_title_he: goalSteps.next_step_title_he || '',
    next_step_instructions_he: goalSteps.next_step_instructions_he || '',
    next_is_final: goalSteps.next_is_final || false,

    // Business profile
    business_profile_text: aiContext.business_profile_text || '',
    message_length_pref: aiContext.message_length_pref || 'medium',
    personality_notes: aiContext.personality_notes || '',

    // Step enrichment
    step_type: goalSteps.step_type || 'question',
    step_effort_level: goalSteps.effort_level || '\u05e7\u05dc',
    step_due_window: goalSteps.due_window || '24h',
    step_definition_of_done: goalSteps.definition_of_done || '',
    step_task_description: goalSteps.task_description || '',
    step_expected_output: goalSteps.expected_output || '',
    step_followup_question: goalSteps.followup_question || '',
    step_guiding_questions: safeJson(goalSteps.guiding_questions, '[]'),
    step_examples: safeJson(goalSteps.examples, '[]'),
    step_business_type_hints: safeJson(goalSteps.business_type_hints, '{}'),
  }
}];

parameters.query: =SELECT fl.*, fs.flow_name_he FROM followup_leads fl JOIN followup_sequences fs ON fs.flow_code = fl.flow_code WHERE fl.lead_phone = '{{ $json.customer_phone }}' AND fl.is_completed = false AND fl.is_do_not_contact = false ORDER BY fl.created_at DESC LIMIT 1;
=UPDATE followup_leads SET is_paused=true, pause_reason='customer_replied_hot', last_customer_reply_at=NOW(), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.id }}';
=UPDATE followup_leads SET is_do_not_contact=true, is_completed=true, pause_reason='customer_requested_stop', updated_at=NOW() WHERE lead_phone='{{ $json.customer_phone }}';
=UPDATE followup_leads SET is_paused=true, pause_reason='customer_replied', last_customer_reply_at=NOW(), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.id }}';

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ temperature: $json.temperature, bot_first_answer: $json.choice, bot_desired_action: $json.nextAction, bot_current_step: $json.current_step, bot_outcome_state: $json.outcomeState, bot_messages_count: 2, bot_last_message_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ current_step: $json.current_step, temperature: $json.temperature, outcome_state: $json.outcomeState, answers: { step1: $json.choice, text: $json.user_text }, messages_count: 2, last_message_at: new Date().toISOString(), completed_at: ["handoff","booked_call","awaiting_docs","requested_quote"].includes($json.nextAction) ? new Date().toISOString() : null }) }}
